judge_result.short_rationale: Includes washing and a post-wash covering step, but changes the priority by putting clothing removal first, adds unsupported soap/15-20 minutes/solvent advice, and weakens the required escalation by saying to seek care only if irritation remains instead of consulting a skin specialist after any confirmed exposure.

  "short_rationale": "Includes washing and a post-wash covering step, but changes the priority by putting clothing removal first, adds unsupported soap/15-20 minutes/solvent advice, and weakens the required escalation by saying to seek care only if irritation remains instead of consulting a skin specialist after any confirmed exposure."
}
